parameters.jsCode:
const aiContent = $input.item.json.choices[0].message.content; const metrics = $('Aggregate Weekly Metrics').item.json; const subjectDate = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' }); const htmlBody = `

Weekly Business Report — ${metrics.week_of}

At a Glance

💰 Revenue ${metrics.total_revenue} ${metrics.revenue_wow}
👥 New Customers ${metrics.new_customers} ${metrics.new_customers_wow}
🌐 Sessions ${metrics.website_sessions} ${metrics.website_sessions_wow}
🎯 Conversion Rate ${metrics.conversion_rate} —
🎫 Support Tickets ${metrics.support_tickets} ${metrics.support_tickets_wow}
${aiContent.split('\n\n').map(p => `

${p}

`).join('')}

Auto-generated by AI Weekly Report workflow • ${new Date().toISOString()}

`; return { json: { subject: `Weekly Report — ${subjectDate}: Revenue ${metrics.total_revenue} (${metrics.revenue_wow})`, html_body: htmlBody, text_body: aiContent, metrics } };
